examples: they study the evolution of the universe

senses.definition: people in general; especially a distinctive group of people with some shared interest
all of your experiences that determine how things appear to you
examples: for them demons were as much a part of reality as trees were

senses.definition: the 3rd planet from the sun; the planet we live on
examples: the Earth moves around the sun

senses.definition: people in general considered as a whole
examples: he is a hero in the eyes of the public

senses.definition: a part of the earth that can be considered separately
the concerns of this life as distinguished from heaven and the afterlife
examples: they consider the church to be independent of the world

senses.definition: all of the living human inhabitants of the earth
examples: all the world loves a lover
she always used ‘humankind’ because ‘mankind’ seemed to slight the women

senses.definition: involving the entire earth; not limited or provincial in scope
examples: neither national nor continental but planetary
